source.note: Read-only MES BOM crawl. Cookies are not persisted.

attributes.dataSource: ENUM::VerState
ENUM::DefEvent

SELECT	*FROM	(	SELECT	x.CONSUMABLE_DEF_NAME AS VALUE,	x.CONSUMABLE_DEF_NAME AS LABEL,	'<' || x.DESCRIPTION || '><' || x.UNIT || '>' AS "DESC"	FROM	CONSUMABLE_DEF x	WHERE	'Consumable' = #{materialType}	AND x.CONSUMABLE_DEF_STATE = 'Valid'	ORDER BY	x.CONSUMABLE_DEF_NAME) A UNION ALL SELECT	*FROM	(	SELECT	y.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AS VALUE,	y.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME AS LABEL,	'<' || y.DESCRIPTION || '><>' AS "DESC"	FROM	PRODUCT_DEF y	WHERE	'Product' = #{materialType}	AND (y.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE = 'Frozen'	OR y.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE = 'Active')	ORDER BY	y.PRODUCT_DEF_NAME) B UNION ALL SELECT	*FROM	(	SELECT	z.DURABLE_DEF_NAME AS VALUE,	z.DURABLE_DEF_NAME AS LABEL,	'<' || z.DESCRIPTION || '><>' AS "DESC"	FROM	DURABLE_DEF z	WHERE	'Durable' = #{materialType}	AND z.DURABLE_DEF_STATE = 'Valid'	ORDER BY	z.DURABLE_DEF_NAME) C

SELECT DISTINCT PRODUCT_DEF.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AS VALUE, PRODUCT_DEF.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AS LABEL, PRODUCT_DEF.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE AS DESCRIPTION FROM PRODUCT_DEF  WHERE 'Product' = #{materialType} AND PRODUCT_DEF.product_def_name = #{materialDefName} AND (PRODUCT_DEF.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE = 'Frozen' OR PRODUCT_DEF.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE = 'Active') UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'AA' AS VALUE, 'AA' AS LABEL, '' AS DESCRIPTION FROM PRODUCT_DEF  WHERE 'Product' = #{materialType}

SELECT dev.ENUM_VALUE AS VALUE, dev.LABEL AS LABEL, dev.DESCRIPTION AS "DESC" FROM DICT_ENUM_VALUE dev, DICT_ENUM_TYPE det, CONSUMABLE_DEF cd WHERE det.ENUM_TYPE = 'Unit' AND dev.ENUM_TYPE = det.ENUM_TYPE AND dev.ENUM_VALUE = cd.UNIT AND cd.CONSUMABLE_DEF_NAME = #{materialDefName};
API::http://mes-modeling-service/processSeqStep/processNameList?processFlowSeqType=ProcessStep
API::http://mes-modeling-service/processSeqStep/processVersionList?processName=#{processStepName}&processFlowSeqType=ProcessStep

SELECT DISTINCT PRODUCT_DEF.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AS VALUE, PRODUCT_DEF.PRODUCT_DEF_VERSION AS LABEL, PRODUCT_DEF.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE AS DESCRIPTION FROM PRODUCT_DEF  WHERE 'Product' = #{materialType} AND PRODUCT_DEF.product_def_name = #{materialDefName} AND (PRODUCT_DEF.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE = 'Frozen' OR PRODUCT_DEF.PRODUCT_DEF_STATE = 'Active') UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT 'AA' AS VALUE, 'AA' AS LABEL, '' AS DESCRIPTION FROM PRODUCT_DEF  WHERE 'Product' = #{materialType}

SELECT dev.ENUM_VALUE AS VALUE, dev.LABEL AS LABEL, dev.DESCRIPTION AS "DESC" FROM DICT_ENUM_VALUE dev, DICT_ENUM_TYPE det, CONSUMABLE_DEF cd WHERE det.ENUM_TYPE = 'Unit' AND dev.ENUM_TYPE = det.ENUM_TYPE AND dev.ENUM_VALUE = cd.UNIT AND cd.CONSUMABLE_DEF_NAME = #{materialDefName};
